label: Gong
description: Connect Gong to access call recordings, transcripts, and revenue intelligence data from your sales conversations.

form.title: Connect Gong
form.subtitle: Paste your Gong API credentials to give Anton access to calls, transcripts, and deal intelligence.

methods.label: Access Key + Secret
methods.description: Paste your Gong API Access Key and Access Key Secret from Company Settings. Fastest setup — no OAuth flow needed.
methods.how_to:
## Generate a Gong API Access Key

Gong uses an Access Key / Access Key Secret pair for API authentication. Only a Gong Technical Administrator can create these.

### Steps

1. Log in to Gong as a Technical Administrator.
2. Go to **Company Settings** (top-right avatar → Settings).
3. In the left sidebar, navigate to **Ecosystem → API**.
4. Click **Create** (or **Generate API Key** if you have none yet).
5. Give the key a name like `Anton` so you can identify it later.
6. Gong displays the **Access Key** and **Access Key Secret** — copy both now. **The secret is shown only once and cannot be retrieved again.**
7. Paste the values into the fields below and click **Submit**.

### Notes

- If you lose the secret, you must revoke the key and create a new one.
- The key inherits the permissions of the Technical Administrator account that created it — keep it stored securely.
- To revoke access later, return to **Company Settings → Ecosystem → API** and delete the key.

fields.name: access_key
fields.label: Access Key
fields.description: Found in Company Settings → Ecosystem → API after generating a key pair.

fields.name: access_key_secret
fields.label: Access Key Secret
fields.description: Shown only once when the key is created. If lost, revoke the key and generate a new pair.

fields.name: base_url
fields.label: API Base URL
fields.description: Override only if your Gong account uses a regional or custom endpoint. Leave as default for most accounts.
